description: A customer 'Apex Legal Services' has ordered a 'Bespoke Mahogany Desk' priced at $4,200.00. Company policy requires a 30% down payment before work begins. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) and process a sales order for 'Apex Legal Services' for one 'Bespoke Mahogany Desk' at $4,200.00. The completed task must include a confirmed sales order with a posted and paid 30% down payment invoice, and a posted final invoice for the remaining balance.
